displayNameZh: AI 快速产出多版本成果
summary: Yt Audio Fast Results component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「AI 快速产出多版本成果」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-audio-fast-results/src/YtAudioFastResults.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtAudioFastResults` and `ytAudioFastResultsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Audio Fast Results Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-audio-fast-results to my project. Preserve the exported YtAudioFastResultsProps API and register the YtAudioFastResults composition with the default props.
